title: “No dignity”: Matt Walsh erupts over Erika Kirk boyfriend rumor while Blake Wynn breaks silence
summary_full: Matt Walsh criticized an X user for spreading claims that Erika Kirk was dating Blake Wynn. The rumor originated from Project Constitution, which alleged the two were seen together at a Beverly Hills hotel. Erika Kirk strongly denied the accusation, saying she was in Arizona with her family. Blake Wynn also rejected the rumor and said they are not dating.
